ai_draft: Admin authentication is complete: sign-in, password reset, and session handling are live and verified.

pmba_text: Application forms are progressing well; the configurable field builder shipped this cycle and validation is in active development.

ai_draft: Applications management review/approve flow is on staging awaiting QA.
pmba_text: We expect applications management to clear QA next sprint and move to client sign-off.

ai_draft: Family members can be added to an application; inline edit and reordering are in design.
pmba_text: Core family-member capture is shipped. We're scoping a small enhancement for inline editing — no impact to the current timeline.

ai_draft: Industry partner management is in integration; partner status filters were expanded at the client's request.
pmba_text: Industry Partners grew slightly this cycle (+4h FE) to add the extra partner-status filters you asked for. Now in integration testing.

ai_draft: Payment gateway integration is in progress; the vendor SDK reduced backend scope.
pmba_text: Good news on Integrations — the payment gateway SDK covers retry handling we'd planned to build, trimming 4h of backend effort.
Project coordination was extended (+20h) to cover the multi-currency change-request scoping and the additional client review cycles this cycle.

ai_draft: Reporting is complete; export now produces a branded PDF in addition to CSV.
pmba_text: Reports shipped this cycle. We added branded PDF export on top of CSV (+4h FE) so the output is client-ready.

ai_draft: Resource upload and management is in integration; an async virus scan was added before downloads.
pmba_text: Resources is in integration. We added an async virus-scan step (+2h BE) before files are downloadable, for member safety.
